args.query: SELECT q.Id, q.OpportunityId, q.AccountId, q.ContactId, q.Name, q.Description, q.Status, q.CreatedDate, q.ExpirationDate, SUM(qi.Quantity) as Total_Quantity, SUM(qi.TotalPrice) as Total_Price, COUNT(qi.Id) as Line_Item_Count FROM Quote q LEFT JOIN QuoteLineItem qi ON q.Id = qi.QuoteId WHERE q.Id = '0Q0Wt000001WSDVKA4' OR q.Id = '#0Q0Wt000001WSDVKA4' GROUP BY q.Id, q.OpportunityId, q.AccountId, q.ContactId, q.Name, q.Description, q.Status, q.CreatedDate, q.ExpirationDate
